title: Define Operation
text: Define Operation Define operations for the current component implementation. The Details of Operation section of this form shows the specification details for the operation, while the Details of Implementation section enables you to provide implementation-specific information for the operation. Fields Name —For non-Uniface implementations, this name is mapped to the literal name.
